metadata.significance: Opens with oath by charging war horses, criticizes human ingratitude and materialism

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلْعَـٰدِيَـٰتِ ضَبْحًا

translations.en_yusufali: By the (Steeds) that run, with panting (breath),
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi Kuda Perang yang tangkas berlari dengan kedengaran kencang nafasnya,

translations.en_sahih: And the producers of sparks [when] striking
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta mencetuskan api dari telapak kakinya,

translations.en_yusufali: And push home the charge in the morning,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan meluru menyerbu musuh pada waktu subuh,

translations.en_yusufali: And raise the dust in clouds the while,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sehingga menghamburkan debu pada waktu itu,

translations.en_sahih: Arriving thereby in the center collectively,
translations.en_yusufali: And penetrate forthwith into the midst (of the foe) en masse;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu menggempur ketika itu di tengah-tengah kumpulan musuh;

translations.en_sahih: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.
translations.en_yusufali: Truly man is, to his Lord, ungrateful;
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya manusia sangat tidak bersyukur akan nikmat Tuhannya.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, he is to that a witness.
translations.en_yusufali: And to that (fact) he bears witness (by his deeds);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya ia (dengan bawaannya) menerangkan dengan jelas keadaan yang demikian;

translations.en_sahih: And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense.
translations.en_yusufali: And violent is he in his love of wealth.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya ia melampau sangat sayangkan harta (secara tamak haloba).

ayahs.arabic: ۞ أَفَلَا يَعْلَمُ إِذَا بُعْثِرَ مَا فِى ٱلْقُبُورِ
ayahs.transliteration: Afala yaAAlamu itha buAAthira ma fee alquboori

translations.en_sahih: But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered
translations.en_yusufali: Does he not know,- when that which is in the graves is scattered abroad
translations.ms_basmeih: (Patutkah ia bersikap demikian?) Tidakkah ia mengetahui (bagaimana keadaan) ketika dibongkarkan segala yang ada dalam kubur?

translations.en_sahih: And that within the breasts is obtained,
translations.en_yusufali: And that which is (locked up) in (human) breasts is made manifest-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan dikumpul serta didedahkan segala yang terpendam dalam dada?

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Acquainted.
translations.en_yusufali: That their Lord had been Well-acquainted with them, (even to) that Day?
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Tuhan mereka Maha Mengetahui dengan mendalam tentang (balasan yang diberikanNya kepada) mereka - pada hari itu.
